title: Looking for a proper way to report projects during Steering Committee meetings

posts.author: sebnunes (Sebastien Nunes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We have a portfolio board with all the main projects the team is handling a I would like to find a clean way to report on that board for our quarterly steering commitee meetings.

The table format works for me so that I can show each projects and their status but I don’t want to show the table in edit mode and with annoying things like the conversation icon.

Did anyone found a way to do proper reporting using something from the marketplace as I don’t see this doable OOTB?

Thanks.
Séb
